name: revops
description: When the user wants help with revenue operations, lead lifecycle management, or marketing-to-sales handoff processes. Also use when the user mentions 'RevOps,' 'revenue operations,' 'lead scoring,' 'lead routing,' 'MQL,' 'SQL,' 'pipeline stages,' 'deal desk,' 'CRM automation,' 'marketing-to-sales handoff,' 'data hygiene,' 'leads aren't getting to sales,' 'pipeline management,' 'lead qualification,' or 'when should marketing hand off to sales.' Use this for anything involving the systems and proc
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 这是一个营收运营工具，专治营销线索交接给销售时的断层问题，适合需要梳理线索生命周期、管理销售管线及自动化CRM流程的团队。
